headline: Can Coca-Cola Balance Pricing, Affordability in Soft Macro Backdrop?
summary: KO shifts from pricing-led growth to volume recovery as affordability pressures rise, testing its ability to sustain demand in a softening macro environment.

headline: Beverages, Alcohol, and Tobacco Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP)
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q4 beverages, alcohol, and tobacco earnings season.
